SEARCH
Module org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject
Package org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo

Class Game

java.lang.Object
org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
public class Game extends Object
Represents a Game entity in the system. This class stores game-related data such as title, developer, platform, genre, and metadata. It provides controlled access through getters and setters. Design Choice: Encapsulation is used to protect data integrity while allowing controlled modification of mutable fields.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Faariz Sheikh
Date:
2026-03-17

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(int id, String title, String developer, int year, String genre, String platform, String imageUrl)
      Constructs a Game object with all required attributes.
      Parameters:
      id - unique game identifier
      title - game title
      developer - developer or studio name
      year - release year of the game
      genre - game genre/category
      platform - platform name
      imageUrl - image URL or path for the game

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of the game. Format: "Title (Year) by Developer"
